name: COGNITION THERAPEUTICS INC
summary: PARTI Overview We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company engaged in the discovery and development of innovative, small molecule therapeutics targeting age-related degenerative diseases and disorders of the central nervous system, or CNS, and retina. Currently available therapies for these diseases are limited, with many diseases having no approved therapies or treatments. Our goal is to develop disease-modifying treatments for patients with these degenerative disorders. Our lead product ...
